prompt: Audit the interface debt accumulated over these rounds and report it.
context: InterfaceBench longitudinal · Round 10 · honest debt audit after a brand redesign and nine prior rounds of change
expected_behaviour: produce an honest audit: duplicated components, divergent patterns, missing states, dependency growth, accessibility gaps
catch residue from the Round-5 status change and Round-9 brand redesign (drift in forgotten surfaces)
record provenance and licence status of any sourced techniques
demonstrate debt stayed bounded and propose a prioritised remediation path
avoid declaring 'no debt' or papering over known gaps
judgement: Pass if the audit honestly surfaces real debt incl. drift from Rounds 5 and 9, tracks provenance, and offers a prioritised remediation plan.
